items.title: Frosting, sprinkles and layers of fun: Giant cake picnic hits Sydney
items.dek: Hundreds of bakers head to Sydney's Botanic Gardens to share and savour their colourful creations.
items.body: Hundreds of bakers head to Sydney's Botanic Gardens to share and savour their colourful creations.

items.title: USMNT handed reality check by Doku, Belgium ahead of World Cup
items.dek: Belgium provided a sobering assessment of where the USMNT currently stands, doling out a heavy 5-2 defeat that will leave Mauricio Pochettino with plenty to pon
items.body: Belgium provided a sobering assessment of where the USMNT currently stands, doling out a heavy 5-2 defeat that will leave Mauricio Pochettino with plenty to ponder.

items.title: Player ratings: Weah poor as USMNT suffer heavy Belgium defeat
items.dek: It was a difficult game for the U.S. against Belgium, with Tim Weah struggling to make a positive impact.
items.body: It was a difficult game for the U.S. against Belgium, with Tim Weah struggling to make a positive impact.
